column1: He opened his eyes, looked around and tried to remember what (to happen) to him.
All the passengers (to see) at once that the old man had travelled a great deal in his life.
By the time we came to see him, he (to return) home.
During the holidays my friend (to visit) the village where he had lived in his childhood.
When they entered the hall, the performance ... already ... (to begin).
When I came home, my mother (to tell) me that she had recieved a letter from grandfather.
Where ... you ... (to work) before you went to university?
He had known French before he (to visit) France.
Lanny said that he (to get) his education in Cape Town.
The boy (to want) to act the main part in the play because he had organized the theatre.
Lanny didn't know who (to attack) him in the darkness.
The girl (to be) glad that she had found a seat near the window.
